name: Ejecutar Automatizaciones - Lunes 09:00

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 7 * * 1'
  
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  automatizacion:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      
      - name: Configurar Python 3.11
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
      
      - name: 📋 Resumen de Tareas
        run: python scripts/resumen_tareas_lunes.py
      
      - name: 🔍 Novedades SEO
        run: echo "📂 Portales SEO programados"
      
      - name: 🗺️ Novedades SEO Local
        run: echo "📂 Portales SEO Local programados"
      
      - name: 🤖 Novedades IA
        run: echo "📂 Portales IA programados"
